Transform-Form-Data-and-Fetch-Course-Sco.name: Transform Form Data and Fetch Course Score

Issue-a-Verifiable-Credential.name: Issue a Verifiable Credential
Issue-a-Verifiable-Credential.body:
issueCredential({
  credential: {
    "@context": [
      "https://www.w3.org/2018/credentials/v1",
      "https://littlemight.github.io/sunbird-demo-vc-context/demo-context.json"
    ],
    "type": [
      "VerifiableCredential",
      "ProofOfAcademicEvaluationCredential"
    ],
    "issuer": "did:web:example.com:identifier:9536bc3b-3f4b-4cec-8c48-f67c9c4d63fc",
    "issuanceDate": new Date().toISOString(),
    "expirationDate": new Date(new Date().setFullYear(new Date().getFullYear() + 2)).toISOString(),
    "credentialSubject": {
      "id": "did:schema:7b2fc25c-b7f6-40b5-bee4-d95bb5924450",
      "type": "ProofOfAcademicEvaluationCredential",
      "name": $.normalized.name,
      "grade": $.normalized.grade,
      "programme": $.normalized.programme,
      "certifyingInstitute": "YourSkillsFuture Council",
      "evaluatingInstitute": "Institute of Digital Learning, India",
    }
  },
  "credentialSchemaId": "did:schema:7b2fc25c-b7f6-40b5-bee4-d95bb5924450",
  "credentialSchemaVersion": "1.0.0",
  "tags": ["demo", "education", "cross-border"]
})

Fetch-certificate-as-PDF.name: Fetch certificate as PDF

Deliver-to-citizen.name: Deliver to citizen
Deliver-to-citizen.body:
send({ from: 'admin@openfn.org', to: $.normalized.email, cc: [ 'taylor@openfn.org', 'cheryl@open.gov.sg', 'michel@open.gov.sg', 'kartheek@sanketika.in', 'jack@openfn.org', 'pius@openfn.org', 'mohit@coss.org.in', ], subject: '✨ You have a new verifiable credential! ✅', html: `

Dear ${$.normalized.name},

🥳 Congratulations 🎉 on your new verifiable credential! The deatils are below and a PDF version is attached to this email.

Subject:

    ${Object.entries(state.proof.credentialSubject).map(([key, value]) => `
  • ${key}: ${typeof value === 'object' ? JSON.stringify(value) : value}
    • ` ).join('')}

Proof:

    ${Object.entries(state.proof.proof).map(([key, value]) => `
  • ${key}: ${typeof value === 'object' ? JSON.stringify(value) : value}
    • ` ).join('')}

Best,
Your Government

Powered 🇸🇬 FormSG and 🇮🇳 SunbirdRC. Automated by 🌍 OpenFn.

`, attachment: { filename: 'credential.pdf', data: $.data }, });

Notify-if-invalid.name: Notify if invalid

Alert-institution-credential-issuance.name: Alert institution credential issuance
Alert-institution-credential-issuance.body:
send({
  from: 'admin@openfn.org',
  to: [
    'taylor@openfn.org',
    'cheryl@open.gov.sg',
    'michel@open.gov.sg',
    'kartheek@sanketika.in',
    'jack@openfn.org',
    'pius@openfn.org',
    'mohit@coss.org.in',
  ],
  subject: 'New credential issued',
  text: 'A new credential has just been issued: \n\n'
    + `Subject: ${JSON.stringify($.proof.credentialSubject, null, 2)}\n\n`
    + `Proof: ${JSON.stringify($.proof.proof, null, 2)}\n\n`
    + `Best,\n`
    + `Your Government`
});
